chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.574 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objection No.25 2. For order on CMA No.2736/2024 3. For hearing of main case 4. For order on CMA No.2737/2024 11.02.2026 Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel the question before the Court is already covered against the applicant-department by virtue of Supreme Court Judgment in the case of M/s. Super Asia reported as 2019 SCMR 1735 and in the case of M/s. Wak Limited reported as 2025 SCMR 1230, in view hereof the reference may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned-Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
